VAL-TEST-001.title: Vitest coverage thresholds configured

steps.expected: Coverage provider and minimum thresholds defined
steps.observed: coverage.provider set to 'v8', thresholds set to 80% for lines, functions, branches, and statements; reporters set to ['text', 'lcov']

Coverage report generated with v8 provider. Thresholds enforced: ERROR messages shown for lines (70% < 80%), functions (69.69% < 80%), statements (69.56% < 80%), branches (43.79% < 80%). Test run correctly fails when thresholds are not met.

VAL-TEST-001.evidence: vitest.config.ts contains: coverage: { provider: 'v8', thresholds: { lines: 80, functions: 80, branches: 80, statements: 80 }, reporter: ['text', 'lcov'] }. Running `pnpm test -- --coverage` produces a v8 coverage report and enforces thresholds (exits with error when below 80%).

VAL-TEST-002.title: Vitest test isolation configured

steps.expected: Parallel or isolated execution configured via pool threads or forks

steps.action: Run pnpm test to verify parallel execution
steps.observed: Tests executed successfully across 3 workspace packages (@nivalis/utils, @nivalis/ai, @nivalis/web) using Vitest v4.0.18 with threaded pool

VAL-TEST-002.evidence: vitest.config.ts contains: pool: 'threads', maxWorkers: 4. Test output confirms Vitest v4.0.18 runs tests across workspace packages with thread-based isolation.

VAL-TEST-003.title: Test performance tracking configured

steps.expected: Verbose reporter or timing-capable reporter configured

steps.action: Run pnpm test and check output for per-file timing
steps.observed: Each test shows individual timing (e.g., '1ms', '0ms', '5ms'). Summary shows total duration breakdown: '@nivalis/utils Duration 325ms (transform 73ms, setup 0ms, import 777ms, tests 18ms, environment 0ms)' and '@nivalis/ai Duration 1.28s (transform 193ms, setup 0ms, import 2.80s, tests 116ms, environment 0ms)'

VAL-TEST-003.evidence: vitest.config.ts sets reporter: ['verbose']. Test output shows per-test timing in milliseconds and per-suite duration breakdown (transform, setup, import, tests, environment durations).

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-TEST-001: v8 coverage provider with 80% thresholds enforced. VAL-TEST-002: thread pool with 4 max workers for test isolation. VAL-TEST-003: verbose reporter shows per-test and per-suite timing.
